spec.reasoning: Using lexical renaming for columns and sheet to test if the agent hardcodes names. 'player_class'->'hero_type' (same descriptiveness, compound noun to compound noun), 'depo'->'deposit' (abbreviation to full word — actually 'depo' is an abbreviation so 'deposit' is close but let me keep abbreviation level: use 'dpst' instead). Actually 'depo' is informal/abbreviation so 'deposit' maintains similar descriptiveness as a financial term. Renaming sheet 'raw 1' to 'source 1' (same pattern). Skipping blank_row_insert because the task references specific cell addresses (G4, F4:F8, A1:C1) and the previous attempt failed for this exact reason. Adding distractor column 'dep_flag' which is plausibly similar to 'deposit'/'depo' but clearly different.
